login.seo_desc: Login to your Vietnam Train account to manage orders, track schedules and receive early ticket offers.

branding.title: Journey Home
branding.desc: Join millions of passengers across Vietnam. Book fast, safe and secure.

form.title: Welcome Back!
form.subtitle: Enter info to continue your journey.

validation.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters

register.seo_desc: Create a new account at Vietnam Train to experience modern, fast and safe online train booking service.

form.title: Create New Account
form.subtitle: Start your modern train booking experience today.

messages.ACCOUNT_CREATED_OTP_SENT: Your account was created. An OTP has been sent to your email.
messages.EMAIL_UNVERIFIED_OTP_SENT: This email is already registered but not verified. A new OTP has been sent.
messages.EMAIL_ALREADY_USED: This email is already in use.
messages.EMAIL_VERIFIED: Email verified successfully. Please log in.
messages.EMAIL_ALREADY_VERIFIED: This email has already been verified.
messages.LOGIN_REQUIRES_EMAIL_VERIFICATION: Please verify your email before logging in.
messages.INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_OTP: The OTP is invalid or expired.
messages.OTP_ALREADY_USED: This OTP has already been used.
messages.OTP_RESENT: A new OTP has been sent to your email.
